title: Crunchy Ethiopian Onion Stir-fry
description: This weeknight dish combines the umami flavors of chives with crispy onions in a gluten-free-friendly recipe that’s perfect for any evening.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped green onion and green chives, stir for about 2 minutes until they start to soften.
Stir in ginger paste and soy sauce, reduce heat to low-medium and simmer for 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Pour in water while stirring continuously to create a creamy consistency.
Simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Taste and adjust seasonings as needed. Serve hot over rice.
